/home/nxank4/.cache/cachepawl/vllm-cachepawl-venv/bin/python -c 'import json
from cachepawl.integrations.vllm import observe_vllm_mamba_attention_contract
from vllm import LLM, SamplingParams
llm = LLM(
    model='"'"'Zyphra/Zamba2-2.7B-instruct'"'"',
    max_model_len=4096,
    gpu_memory_utilization=0.7,
    max_num_seqs=1,
    trust_remote_code=False,
)
sampling_params = SamplingParams(
    max_tokens=8,
    temperature=0.0,
    ignore_eos=True,
)
payload = observe_vllm_mamba_attention_contract(
    llm,
    prompt='"'"'Count from one to four:'"'"',
    sampling_params=sampling_params,
    max_new_tokens=8,
).to_dict()
print('"'"'CACHEPAWL_MAMBA_ATTENTION_CONTRACT_OBSERVATION='"'"' + json.dumps(payload, sort_keys=True))
del llm'
